name: CRED
benefit_user: Get up to ₹250 cashback on your first credit card bill payment.
steps: Download CRED using the link.
Apply with your mobile number to check credit score.
Add a credit card and make a bill payment of minimum ₹1000.

faq.question: What is the minimum bill payment amount?
faq.answer: You need to pay a minimum of ₹1000 on your first bill payment.

name: Fi Money
benefit_user: Get ₹200 added to your new account.
benefit_owner: I get ₹200 added to my account.
steps: Download the Fi app and sign up.
Enter the referral code HUSS123 during signup.
Add a minimum of ₹3000 to your account within 7 days.

faq.question: Can I withdraw the ₹3000 immediately?
faq.answer: Yes, but it's recommended to keep it for a few days until the bonus is credited.

name: Groww
benefit_user: Get ₹100 reward directly to your Groww balance.
benefit_owner: I get ₹100 when you successfully open your Demat account.
steps: Click the link to download the Groww app.
Complete your KYC and open a free Demat account.
The ₹100 will be credited within 24-48 hours.

faq.question: Are there any account opening charges?
faq.answer: No, opening a Demat account on Groww is completely free.

name: Upstox
benefit_user: Zero brokerage for the first 30 days.
benefit_owner: I get ₹200 when you open an account.
steps: Sign up using the referral link.
Complete your e-KYC using Aadhaar and PAN.
Place your first trade to activate the account fully.

faq.question: Do I need to maintain a minimum balance?
faq.answer: No, there is no minimum balance requirement for Upstox.

name: Swiggy Instamart
benefit_user: Get ₹100 off on your first Instamart order above ₹399.
steps: Download the Swiggy app if you haven't already.
Navigate to the Instamart section.
Add items worth ₹399 or more and apply the invite code.

faq.question: Is this valid for Swiggy food delivery?
faq.answer: This specific code is exclusively for Swiggy Instamart groceries.

name: Zomato
benefit_user: Get 50% off (up to ₹100) on your first food delivery order.
steps: Download Zomato and register with a new phone number.
Add food to your cart from your favorite restaurant.
Enter the referral code in the promos section before paying.

faq.question: Does it work for existing users?
faq.answer: No, referral codes only work for entirely new phone numbers and devices.

name: Paytm
benefit_user: Get ₹100 cashback on your first UPI money transfer.
benefit_owner: I get ₹100 cashback directly to my bank account.
steps: Click the link to install the Paytm app.
Link your bank account to create a Paytm UPI ID.
Send a minimum of ₹1 to any UPI ID or phone number.

faq.question: When do I get the cashback?
faq.answer: The scratch card with ₹100 cashback is issued immediately after your first transaction.

name: Jupiter Money
benefit_user: Get ₹300 when you open an account and complete KYC.
steps: Download the Jupiter app.
Use the referral code during the sign-up process.
Complete your video KYC to fully activate the zero-balance account.

faq.question: Is Jupiter a real bank?
faq.answer: Jupiter is a neo-bank that partners with Federal Bank to hold your money safely.

name: Flipkart
benefit_user: Get ₹100 off your first purchase of ₹500 or more.
steps: Sign up for a new Flipkart account using the link.
Add items worth at least ₹500 to your cart.
The discount will auto-apply at checkout.

faq.question: Can I use this on Big Billion Days?
faq.answer: Yes, but some bank-specific discounts might not stack with this offer.

name: Myntra
benefit_owner: I get ₹200 Myntra Cash after your first order is delivered.
steps: Download the Myntra app via the invite link.
Create a new account.
The ₹200 Myntra Cash will instantly reflect in your wallet.

faq.question: Does Myntra Cash expire?
faq.answer: Yes, promotional Myntra Cash usually expires within 30 days.
